Subject: You've been locked out of {!Community_Name}
Body:
Hello {!Receiving_User.FirstName},

            We received your request to reset your {!Community_Name} password. We can't reset your password right now. Your account is locked after too many login attempts.

            {!CASE(1,
            IF(VALUE(PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME) > 0, 1, 0), "Try again in " + PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME + " minutes.",
            IF(VALUE(PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME) < 0, 1, 0), "Contact your " + Community_Name + " administrator to unlock your account.",
            "")}

            If you didn't request a password reset or haven't tried to log in to your account recently, contact your {!Community_Name} administrator or reply to this email.

            Thank you,
            {!Community_Name}

Subject: Verify your identity in {!Community_Name}
Your {!Community_Name} account’s email address was changed
Finish changing your {!Community_Name} account’s email address
Verify your identity in {!Community_Name}
Welcome to {!Community_Name}
Your new {!Community_Name} password
Your new {!Community_Name} password
Finish resetting your {!Community_Name} password
Body:
Hi {!User.FirstName},

            It looks like you tried to reset the password for {!Receiving_User.Username}. To keep your account secure, enter the following one-time password where prompted by {!Community_Name}.

            Password: {!Verification_Code}

            If you didn’t try to change your password in {!Community_Name}, contact your {!Community_Name} administrator.

Subject: Verify your identity in {!Community.Name}
Body:
Hello, {!HeadlessAuth.FirstName} {!HeadlessAuth.LastName},

            To confirm your registration as {!HeadlessAuth.Username} in {!Community.Name},

            let’s verify your identity. Enter this one-time password where prompted.

            Password: {!Verification.Code}
